message:
🐛 fix(affiliate): normalize login keys to lowercase for case-insensitive dedup (#9115)

GitHub logins are case-insensitive but GA4 utm_term casing varies by how
mentees share their affiliate links. Previously `Abhishek-Punhani` (from
INTERN_MAP) and `abhishek-punhani` (from contributor_affiliate traffic)
landed as two separate leaderboard entries, splitting clicks.

Fix: lowercase all login keys in mergeEntry and the zero-fill loop so
traffic always consolidates onto one entry regardless of utm_term casing.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
